title: Main program extra line
description: Add +1 max line to the main program.

title: Stronger portal
description: Balls split into +1 extra child ball in the portal.

title: Upcoming-ball preview boost
description: You can now see the next 3 balls at once.

title: Center bucket bonus
description: If a 'center_ball' lands in the center bucket, that ball gets +5 extra points.

title: Helper editor extra line
description: Add +2 max lines to the helper editor.

title: Portal chain
description: Balls created by a portal split can split one more time if they hit a portal.
